_description: AH cycle-alignment known deltas. Mirrors known_count_deltas.json schema but for per-stage cycle counts. The cycle gate (gate=cycles, advisory until Stage 2 VTR lands) compares per-stage RTL TB-measured spans against expected_rtl_cycles in per_stage_targets.json::_alignment_contract. A delta entry here documents a real residual with file:line root-cause citations; the gate accepts if |measured - expected - delta_cycles| <= tolerance.

_schema.stage: linear_qkv | mac_qk | softmax_exp | softmax_norm | mac_sv | e2e
_schema.delta_cycles: RTL_measured - expected_rtl_cycles. Positive = RTL slower than sim; negative = RTL faster.
_schema.tolerance: Allowed wiggle around delta_cycles (typically small for FSM-glue).
_schema.root_cause: file:line citation of the structural or modelling source of the residual.

_status_2026_04_27_post_b5: B-5 head FSM landed (strict-serial 3-stage cascade per Q row).  Both AH configs now produce 1664 valid_n pulses end-to-end and the counter gate passes with all Δ=0 (NL) / Δ=+32 mac_sv (AL, pre-existing FSM-edge effect from c54a7de soft-rst loop).  E2E cycles for both archs are dominated by intra-cascade serialisation: per Q-row latency = score (~150 cyc) + softmax (~140 cyc) + wsum (~270 cyc) for NL with strict-serial cascading on wsum_done_o, and the soft-rst Q+K+V re-stream loop (~3340 cyc per Q row) for AL.  Both far exceed sim's pipelined-cascade analytical lower bound; cycle gate is advisory.

deltas.root_cause: fc_verification/rtl/nldpe_attn_head_d64_c128.v S_CASCADE strict-serial Q-row processing.  The B-5 head FSM uses wsum_done_o as the Q-row advance trigger, which means each Q row goes through score → softmax → wsum sequentially before the next Q row starts.  Per Q row in steady state ≈ 555 cycles (score 14-cyc Q reload + 140-cyc compute + softmax 16-cyc cascade + wsum 8-cyc LOAD_A + 256-cyc EXP_FEED+DRAIN + 64-cyc drain margin + 1-cyc trigger lag).  Total e2e = 3315 (linear_qkv) + 555×128 (cascade) + 64 (drain) + 1664 (output drain) ≈ 76K cyc.  Sim's gemm_log analytical lower bound (5428+5077 cyc for mac_qk+mac_sv plus pipelined-cascade between stages) is the strict serial vs pipelined-cascade modelling-granularity gap.  Closing this requires Architecture C (ping-pong score_sram banks + cross-Q-row pipelined cascade), out of scope for B-5.  The cycle gate is advisory (counter gate is canonical), so this delta does not affect exit code.

Same root cause as e2e: strict-serial Q-row cascade.  Stage-total = T_score_out_last - T_score_out_first + 1.  In strict-serial mode each Q row's score lane stays in S_OUTPUT for ~400 cycles waiting for wsum_done_o, then recycles.  OR-aggregated across W=16 lanes the active S_OUTPUT span spans the entire cascade duration.

Same root cause as e2e: strict-serial Q-row cascade.  softmax SM_EXP fires for ~16 cycles per Q row × 128 Q rows = ~2K active cycles, but the OR-aggregated span across all Q rows includes the wait time between consecutive SM_EXP entries (= cascade per-Q-row time).  Sim models this as 41 cyc total (W=16 row-parallel scaling); RTL is ~71K active span due to strict-serial cascade.
Same as softmax_exp — strict-serial cascade timing.
Same as e2e — strict-serial Q-row cascade.  wsum WS_OUTPUT span per Q row × 128 Q rows.

Pre-existing residual (unchanged from pre-B-5).  See phase7_known_deltas.json: streaming-fill + drain-edge + per-token FSM transition overhead in the 3 fc_top_qkv_streaming arms (fc_verification/rtl/nldpe/fc_top_qkv_streaming.v:20-60).  RTL stage-total = 3315 cyc; sim 2424; delta +891.  Unaffected by B-5 head FSM changes (linear_qkv stage runs entirely before S_LOAD_KV).

fc_verification/rtl/azurelily_attn_head_d64_c128.v S_DIMM_RST/FIRE/WAIT loop (Bug-1 fix from c54a7de) — head FSM soft-resets DIMM-top between Q rows and re-streams full Q+K+V (3342 cyc per Q row × 128 Q rows = 427K cyc) plus per-Q-row DIMM compute (~520 cyc).  B-5 added the new B-5 mode parameter pass-through and connected score_all_done_o / softmax_done_o / wsum_done_o for interface symmetry with NL DIMM-top, but the soft-rst loop is still the active recycling mechanism.  Sim's gemm_dsp pipelined-row analytical model (815+12+47+1450 = ~2.3K cyc for the 4 DIMM stages plus 4K linear_qkv = 6324 e2e) cannot match the RTL's full-stream re-load.  Closing this requires Architecture C (preserve K/V SRAM contents across soft-rst, or move to back-to-back FSM recycling with softmax/mac_sv reset injection).  The cycle gate is advisory (counter gate is canonical), so this delta does not affect exit code.
Same root cause as e2e — soft-rst loop re-streams K=1664 cyc per Q row.  OR-aggregated mac_qk span across all Q rows ≈ 511K cyc.
Same as e2e — soft-rst loop dominates timing.  Sim's row-parallel softmax_exp = 12 cyc; RTL is data-rate-bound by upstream mac_qk's serial 128-row FSM × N=128 Q rows × soft-rst overhead.
Same root cause as e2e — soft-rst loop dominates.  Per-Q-row mac_sv span × 128 Q rows + soft-rst overhead.

Pre-existing residual (unchanged from pre-B-5).  See phase7_known_deltas.json: streaming-fill + drain-edge + per-token FSM transition overhead in the 3 azurelily_fc_128_64 arms (fc_verification/rtl/azurelily/azurelily_fc_128_64.v).  RTL stage-total = 4458 cyc; sim 4000; delta +458.  Unaffected by B-5 head FSM changes (linear_qkv stage runs entirely before S_DIMM_RST).
